backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Event, OrganizerProfile, Booking, Review, etc.), persistent storage maps, and public functions for user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, and admin analytics with authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: useDeletePortfolioImage mutation hook, PortfolioUpload component with delete buttons, and cleanup of deleted portfolio images from static assets directory.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities with descriptions of their functionality and integration points.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the FIESTA application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing, guest, organizer, and admin pages, wrapped in Layout component with Header, Footer, and conditional ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable card component displaying analytics metrics with icon, label, value, and optional description with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin dashboard component fetching and displaying analytics including total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest rated organizer using AnalyticsCard components.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component handling Internet Identity login/logout with query cache clearing on logout and error handling for authentication edge cases.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting full name and email with validation, form submission to backend, and non-dismissible overlay.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Displays a list of bookings for guests with status badges, organizer names, and booking dates. Shows a message if no bookings exist.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Card component for organizers to view and manage individual booking requests with approve/reject actions. Fetches and displays guest contact information from the associated event.
Organizes and displays booking requests for organizers, separating pending requests from past bookings into distinct sections.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: Form component for guests to create new events with fields for event type, location, guest count, style, and contact number. Validates input and calls the create event mutation.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of events in card format showing event details including type, location, guest count, style, contact number, and creation date.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer component displaying copyright information and a link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Navigation header with logo, authenticated user menu links (events, organizers, bookings, dashboard), login button, and responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Card displaying organizer profile information including company name, contact, experience, pricing, rating, availability status, and portfolio image preview with selection checkbox. Handles image loading from sessionStorage or static assets.

A sortable comparison table component that displays organizer profiles with columns for company name, contact, experience, pricing, rating, and availability. Supports sorting by rating or experience years.

A form component for creating or editing organizer profiles with fields for company name, contact number, experience years, pricing range, description, and availability status. Validates inputs and uses the useSaveOrganizerProfile mutation hook.
A read-only view component that displays an organizer's profile details in cards, including contact info, experience, pricing, reviews, availability badge, and an embedded portfolio gallery.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: A gallery component that displays portfolio images in a grid with lightbox functionality for full-screen viewing. Supports navigation between images and handles image loading from sessionStorage or static assets.

A portfolio image upload component with file validation (type, size), preview functionality, batch upload support, and delete capabilities with confirmation dialog. Manages local file state and integrates with backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Handles actor initialization with admin tokens and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile using the actor instance. Returns loading states and profile data, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, availability, and portfolio management with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom navy/gold theme colors, CSS variables for light/dark modes, and utility classes for shadows and brand colors.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that checks user role and displays the AnalyticsDashboard component, redirecting non-admin users to home.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Guest page displaying a list of the authenticated user's bookings with authentication guard redirecting to home if not logged in.
Guest page with two-column layout showing CreateEventForm and EventList for managing user's events, protected by authentication.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Guest page for browsing all organizers with multi-select functionality and navigation to comparison view, protected by authentication.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with hero section, feature cards explaining FIESTA benefits, and CTAs that adapt based on authentication status.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Organizer page displaying booking requests with back navigation to dashboard, protected by authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Displays a side-by-side comparison table of selected organizers based on IDs passed via URL query parameters. Requires authentication and redirects to home if not logged in.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Organizer dashboard page that allows organizers to create/edit their profile, view their profile, manage portfolio uploads, and access booking requests. Requires authentication and shows different views based on whether a profile exists.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon).
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Card component system with subcomponents (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) for consistent card-based layouts throughout the application.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme colors (navy, gold), extended utilities (shadows, animations), container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing FIESTA as an event planning platform with architectural notes, known issues (portfolio images not displaying), and a comprehensive list of implemented features including authentication, event management, organizer profiles, filtering, booking, and reviews.
